settings.heading: Stack the Gristle-Tone pickups with what you just bought
settings.body:
You just secured the effects chain. Now feed it the signal it deserves. The Gristle-Tone signature set pours hum-free single-coil succulence straight into the front of your new Monster.

Two voices per pickup, flawless articulation, and not one cycle of hum to muddy up all that hand-wired glory.

Toss it in now and it rides along with this order. Easy-peasy.
settings.decline_label: No thanks, take me to my order
settings.testimonial_quote: Remarkably hi-fi sounding, with exceptional definition, clarity, and punch.
